mapper.select: select id, name, name_cn from bangumi_subject where type = #{type} and (name_cn like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) order by case when name_cn like concat(#{keyword}, '%') then 0 when name like concat(#{keyword}, '%') then 1 when name_cn like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') then 2 else 3 end, `rank` is null, `rank` asc limit #{limit}

select bs.id, bs.type, bs.name, bs.name_cn, bs.infobox, bs.nsfw, bs.score, bs.score_details, bs.`rank`, bs.images, ( case when idx.subject_id = #{exactSubjectId} then 2000 else 0 end + case when idx.name_cn = #{keyword} then 1200 else 0 end + case when idx.name = #{keyword} then 1100 else 0 end + case when = #{compactKeyword} then 1150 else 0 end + case when = #{compactKeyword} then 1050 else 0 end + case when like concat('%', #{compactKeyword}, '%') then 900 else 0 end + case when idx.name_cn like concat(#{keyword}, '%') then 500 else 0 end + case when idx.name like concat(#{keyword}, '%') then 450 else 0 end + case when like concat(#{compactKeyword}, '%') then 620 else 0 end + case when like concat(#{compactKeyword}, '%') then 560 else 0 end + case when idx.aliases like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') then 320 else 0 end + match(idx.name, idx.name_cn, idx.aliases, idx.tags_text, idx.meta_tags_text, idx.search_text) against(#{keyword} in natural language mode) * 100 + case when idx.subject_rank is not null and idx.subject_rank > 0 then greatest(0, 100 - idx.subject_rank / 50) else 0 end + coalesce(idx.score, 0) * 8 + least(idx.favorite_done, 100000) / 2000 ) as relevanceScore from bangumi_subject_search idx join bangumi_subject bs on bs.id = idx.subject_id
order by
relevanceScore desc, idx.favorite_done desc, idx.subject_rank = 0, idx.subject_rank is null, idx.subject_rank, idx.score desc,
relevanceScore desc, idx.subject_rank = 0, idx.subject_rank is null, idx.subject_rank, idx.score desc, idx.favorite_done desc,
relevanceScore desc, idx.score desc, idx.subject_rank = 0, idx.subject_rank is null, idx.subject_rank, idx.favorite_done desc,
relevanceScore desc, idx.subject_rank = 0, idx.subject_rank is null, idx.subject_rank, idx.favorite_done desc,
idx.subject_id limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select r.subject_id, r.relation_type, r.`order`, s.id, s.type, s.name, s.name_cn, s.infobox, s.platform, s.summary, s.nsfw, s.tags, s.meta_tags, s.score, s.score_details, s.`rank`, s.date, s.favorite, s.series, s.images from bangumi_subject_relation r join bangumi_subject s on r.related_subject_id = s.id where r.subject_id = #{subjectId} and s.type = #{type} order by r.`order`, r.related_subject_id
